span.p:
MatriceQ ← Matrice
alpha ← min pe fiecare linie
beta ← max pe fiecare coloana
v1 ← max&(alpha&) / v2 ← min&(beta&)

div.style: color: rgb(206, 203, 246) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(181, 212, 244) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(206, 203, 246) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(181, 212, 244) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: v ← v1\nX_optim ← 1 unde alpha == v1, normalized\nY_optim ← 1 unde beta == v2, normalized

div.style: color: rgb(181, 212, 244) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Converteste v, X_optim, Y_optim\nla fractii Fraction

div.style: color: rgb(192, 221, 151) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(206, 203, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(245, 196, 179) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(181, 212, 244) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Construieste Problema_liniara_b
OPT = MAX
coef = ones&(n_cols&)
A = MatriceQ
inegalitate = mm pentru fiecare rand
b = ones&(n_rows&)

span.p: X_optim ← v * |Delta&[n_vars:&]|\nY_optim ← v * valori din solution&[:n_vars&]
